results.title: PSG wins back-to-back Champions League titles after shootout victory against Arsenal
results.description: Paris Saint-Germain has won back-to-back Champions League titles by beating Arsenal on penalties in a dramatic final in Budapest.

results.description: The URC final could be played on June 19 at Croke Park, if Leinster qualify and have home advantage

results.title: 76ers Turn to Mike Gansey to Reset Their Future After Morey Era Ends
results.description: The 76ers have spent the past several years living in a strange middle ground, never bad enough to rebuild, never healthy or consistent enough to break through.

results.title: AVP Volleyball is your next sports obsession
results.description: It took a little while for the weather to cooperate, it seems like it still isn’t in some parts of the country, but summer is fully and officially here. We are past Memorial Day, after all. Soon enough you will (hopefully) be doing all of the summer-y things. Chilling, lounging, playing, fishing, and at some [...]

results.title: Ernest Nuamah delighted to return to Black Stars after long injury layoff
results.description: Ghana forward Ernest Nuamah has expressed his excitement after returning to the Black Stars setup following a lengthy spell on the sidelines due to injury. The talented attacker, who was ruled out for almost a year after suffering a serious injury, said he is delighted to be back with the national team and eager to [...] The post Ernest Nuamah delighted to return to Black Stars after long injury layoff appeared first on Ghana News Online .
